name: kite-hub
description: Sistema de préstamo de herramientas de laboratorio

AUTH0_SECRET.description: Random 32-byte hex string for session encryption

AUTH0_BASE_URL.description: Your Heroku app URL, e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com

KIOSK_SECRET.description: Secret key for kiosk API authentication

CRON_SECRET.description: Secret key for job endpoint authorization

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Resend API key for transactional emails

RESEND_FROM.description: From address for emails, e.g. Kite Hub <noreply@yourdomain.com>
